Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
197 
PGM_TYPE_CD 
LABEL: 
Program Type Code 
DESCRIPTION: Code indicating special Medicaid program under which the service was provided. 
SHORT NAME: PGM_TYPE_CD 
LONG NAME: PGM_TYPE_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
IP header 
LT header 
OT header 
RX header 
VALUES: 
00 = No Special Program 
01 = Early and periodic screening and
